title: The Big Picture: Sanctions
summary:
Main
Lower oil prices could open the door for Western countries to tighten sanctions on Russian and Iranian exports. Israel's strike on Iran at the weekend, which avoided the country's oil facilities, has reduced oil's war premium. The Brent December contract fell by $4.52/bl or 5.9% to $71.39/bl in early trading today before recovering slightly to $72.07/bl at 16.53 GMT.
